title: Sour Dense Australian Oyster Mushroom Skillet
description: A sour and dense Australian dish featuring oyster mushrooms, this skillet is a whole30-friendly and indulgent option for dinner, cooked to perfection on a comal and incorporating spherification for a unique twist.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a comal over medium heat.
Add the sliced oyster mushrooms and cook until they release their moisture and start to brown.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the lemon juice, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
In a small bowl, mix the sodium alginate with a small amount of water to create a solution.
Drop the alginate solution into the water bath to create spheres.
Add the spheres to the comal and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Serve the skillet hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
